'itil.an. 427(3t), ïŋ― 31-5-2004 ,t ïŋ―Â· 'itil.m. 644(3t), ïŋ― 25-2-2005 ct ïŋ― . 'itil.an. 263(3t), ïŋ― 31-3-2005 ,t ïŋ―- 'itil.311. 462(3t), ïŋ― 14-7-2006 '<t ïŋ―. 'itil.311. 1121(3t) ïŋ― ïŋ― 31-7-2006 q} ïŋ―- clil.3'11. 1353 ,t ïŋ― ïŋ― ïŋ― ïŋ― I MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE (Depllrtment or Agricult-11,, and Cooperation) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 31st October, 2006 s.o. 1873(E).-'ln exercise of the powers conferred by Sub-section (1) of section 3 of the Destructive Insects and Pests Act, 1914 (2 of 1914), the Central Government hereby makes the following Order further to amend the Plant Quarantine (Regulation of Import into India) Order, 2003, namely:- 1. (1) This Order may be called the Plant Quarantine (Regulation of Import into India) (Third Amendment) Order, 2006. (2) It shall come into force on 1.11.2006. -- 2 of 3 -- c 'IT'1 n = 3(ii) J 3 2. In Schedule VI attached to the said order:- (1) against Serial Number 293(iv) relating to "Stone fruits-dry fruits for consumption": (i) in Column number 4 insert "(i)" before "any country"; (ii) in Column number 4 insert "(ii) almonds from USA"; (iii) In column number 5 against "almonds from USA" the following items shall be inserted namely: "Free from: (a) Mediterranean flour moth (Ephestia kuehniella) (b) Tobacco moth (Ephestia elute/la) (c) Indian meal moth (Plodia interpunctella)". (iv) In column number 6 the following entries shall be inserted against USA: "Fumigation by phosphine or by any other fumigant/substance in the manner approved by the Plant Protection Adviser for this purpose so as to result in complete mortality of all life stages of quarantine pests mentioned in column 5 and the treatment shall be endorsed on the phyto-sanitary certificate" (2) In serial number 305 (iv) relating to pinus species (pine wood) for the existing entries in column number 6, the following entries shall be inserted namely:- "The timber shall be fumigated with Methyl bromide @ 48gm/cubic meter for 24 hrs at 21Â°C and above or equivalent thereof under NAP or heat treatment at 56Â°C and above (core temperature of wood) for 30 minutes or by any other fumigant/substance in the manner approved by the Plant Protection Adviser for this purpose as the case may be at the country of origin and the treatment shall be endorsed on the phyto-sanitary certificate". [F. No. 8-20/2005-PP. I] ASHISH BAHUGUNA, Ji. Secy. Fool Nole.-The Plant Quarantine (Regulation of import into India) Order, 2003 was published in the Gazette of India vide number S.O. 1322(E) dated 18th November, 2003 subsequently amended vide numbers S.O. 167(E) dated 6-2-2004, S.O. 427(E) dated 29th March, 2004, S.0. 644(E) dated 31-5-2004, S.O. 263(E) dated 25-2-2005, S.O. 462(E) dated 31-3-2005, S.O. I l2l(E) dated 14-7-2006 and S.O. 1353 dated 31-7-2006. Printed by the Manager. Govt. of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller or Publicauons.
